public UBAHordeSession(UnrealBuildAcceleratorConfig config, string crypto, Uri? serverUrl, string? accessToken, string? pool, bool allowWine, int maxCores, bool strict, ConnectionMode? connectionMode, Encryption? encryption, ILogger logger)  		{  			_config = config;  			_pool = pool;  			_allowWine = allowWine;  			_maxCores = maxCores;  			_strict = strict;  			_connectionMode = connectionMode;  			_encryption = encryption;  			_logger = logger;  			_crypto = crypto;    			ServiceCollection services = new();  			services.AddLogging(builder => builder.AddEpicDefault());  			services.AddHorde(options =>  			{  				options.ServerUrl = serverUrl;  				options.AccessToken = accessToken;  			});  			_serviceProvider = services.BuildServiceProvider();    			if (connectionMode == ConnectionMode.Relay && String.IsNullOrEmpty(_crypto))  			{  				_crypto = UBAExecutor.CreateCrypto();  				_encryption = Encryption.Ssl;  			}  		}
